sql: SELECT o.id, o.order_no, u.name as user_name, p.name as product_name FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id WHERE o.status = 'active'
templateSql:
SELECT o.id, o.order_no, u.name as user_name, p.name as product_name
FROM orders o
JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
WHERE o.status = 'active'
